extraction.one_line_summary: MERLIER Tim won from chaotic positioning after leadout trains disintegrated inside 3km, KOOIJ Olav surged from 15th at 200m to grab second.
tactical_patterns: POGAČAR attacks intermediate sprint on citadel climb for bonus seconds, revealing time-gaps obsession even on sprint stages.
SOLER Marc bridged alone to breakaway remnants unprompted, suggesting UAE freestyle tactics when POGAČAR secure overall.
Leadout trains of Groupama-FDJ and Lotto completely collapsed inside 3km, indicating positioning failures on lumpy finales.
SAGAN Peter launched early after leadout chaos, triggering opportunistic scramble that punished organized sprint trains.

rider_signals.MERLIER Tim: positive: stayed sheltered until finale chaos, capitalized when structured trains failed
rider_signals.KOOIJ Olav: positive: devastating late acceleration from 15th to 2nd shows top-end speed without leadout
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: neutral: hunting intermediate bonus seconds on sprint stage reveals every-second-counts mentality
rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: negative: mechanically compromised and off-form suggests legs not yet sharp
rider_signals.EWAN Caleb: negative: Lotto leadout work wasted, suggesting either positioning error or lack of top-end speed
rider_signals.SAGAN Peter: neutral: early launch from disorganized position nearly succeeded, showing opportunistic instincts remain
rider_signals.BAIS Davide: positive: secured KOM jersey by finish guarantees podium, smart break selection
rider_signals.SOLER Marc: neutral: unauthorized solo bridge suggests team freedom when leader secure
